response.justification: This is a strong senior individual contributor, but the role is an executive CTO position with hard requirements this resume does not meet. There is no evidence of engineering leadership — no team scaling from 10 to 30+, no development of a technical-leadership layer, no board-level communication, and no governance of outsourced delivery partners. AI-agent exposure is recent (MCP tooling since April 2025) and infrastructure-adjacent rather than demonstrated production multi-agent systems, and fintech experience is limited to roughly a year at RIDE Capital in a non-regulated-scope IC role. The distributed-systems background at Sociomantic is genuinely solid, but it cannot carry an executive mandate.
strengths: Real low-latency, high-throughput distributed-systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby)
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic-AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Broad full-stack versatility with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and open-source track record
concerns: No people-leadership or org-scaling experience — career is entirely senior/staff IC roles, versus a hard requirement of 5+ years senior technical leadership
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems; agentic work is recent, tooling-focused, and unproven at commercial scale
Minimal fintech and regulated-environment depth — ~15 months at an investment platform with no credit-risk, payments, or compliance architecture ownership

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems experience
Strong backend and distributed-systems engineering depth
